docs.title: Documentation
docs.overview.desc: Explore Privacy Router — architecture, setup, security, and more.
docs.overview.problem.text: AI agents autonomously send prompts to external LLM APIs, often containing sensitive information the user never intended to expose. Existing privacy solutions are US-centric and miss Korean-specific PII and contextual secrets.
docs.overview.solution.text: Privacy Router is an on-device Extractor → Judge → Router pipeline that intercepts every agent-generated prompt before it reaches an external LLM API.
docs.install.title: Installation & Execution
docs.install.access.demo: Demo Chat — interactive privacy router demo
docs.install.access.admin: Admin Dashboard — API key and settings management
docs.install.apikey.desc: Create an API key via the admin dashboard or curl
docs.logs.title: 7-Day Usage Log
docs.cost.title: Cost Analysis
docs.cost.two_tier.desc: Routing is based on data sensitivity, not prompt complexity.
docs.cost.vs_bigtech.desc: ChatGPT Plus costs $20/month for a single user. Privacy Router delivers comparable quality with privacy guarantees at a fraction of the cost.
docs.security.title: Privacy & Security
docs.security.dataflow.desc: Every prompt passes through the on-device pipeline before reaching any external API.
docs.security.encryption.desc: All stored sensitive data is encrypted at rest using Fernet symmetric encryption. Keys are rotated per-session.
docs.security.adr.desc: Detailed design rationale for security-relevant decisions.
docs.security.adr.001: ADR-001: No Auth on Key Admin Endpoints
docs.security.adr.001.desc: Admin endpoints are local-only by design
docs.security.adr.002: ADR-002: Public Admin Endpoints for Standalone UI
docs.security.adr.002.desc: Standalone UI requires public admin access
docs.security.adr.003.desc: SQLite chosen for zero-config, single-file deployment
docs.security.adr.004: ADR-004: Keep Deprecated Test MCP Tools
docs.differentiation.title: Differentiation vs Big Tech
docs.differentiation.advantage.1.title: Korean-Specific PII Detection
docs.differentiation.advantage.1.desc: Privacy Router's extractor is trained on Korean resident registration numbers, corporate registration numbers, and Korean address formats. Big Tech solutions focus on US Social Security Numbers and ZIP codes, missing critical Korean PII patterns entirely.
docs.differentiation.advantage.2.title: Contextual Secret Protection
docs.differentiation.advantage.2.desc: Beyond PII, Privacy Router detects business secrets (fabrication processes, pricing strategies) and research secrets (novel algorithms, unpublished findings) using contextual Socratic evaluation. No existing solution addresses this class of sensitive data.
docs.differentiation.advantage.3.title: Transparent Policy Engine
docs.differentiation.advantage.3.desc: Every routing decision is logged with full extraction results, harm classifications, and policy rationale. Users and auditors can trace exactly why a prompt was masked, routed locally, or sent to the cloud. Big Tech offers no equivalent visibility.
